executives.name: John Batten
executives.background: Mr. Batten has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. He is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Twin Disc, Inc., a manufacturer of power transmission equipment.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
